## What this changes

A short description of the change and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck && npm test` passes locally
- [ ] The architecture and module-load meta tests still pass (they run as part of `npm test`)
- [ ] Behavioral changes ship with a test that would fail without the change
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior, configuration, or the security model changed
- [ ] No em dashes in prose or comments; no internal tracking handles

## Security impact

Does this touch the approval bridge, pairing, frame authentication, or the wire format? If so,
describe the impact and how you verified it.
